title: Bitter Chewy Egyptian Cheese Curds Bake
description: A sick-day Egyptian dish featuring cheese curds, ice-bath-shock, and a dash of feta. This bitter, chewy recipe is perfect for when you're feeling under the weather.
instructions: Mix together ricotta cheese, feta cheese, and 1 tablespoon of water in a bowl until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Transfer the dish to an ice bath and let cool completely, about 30 minutes.
Once cooled, refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Cut into 9-12 squares before serving, depending on desired size.
Freeze for up to 3 months if not serving immediately, and thaw at room temperature when needed.
